executives.name: Chris Reynolds
executives.background: Mr. Reynolds has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He joined Seabridge in 2007 and has served as Vice President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer since that time.

executives.name: Rudi Fronk
executives.background: Mr. Fronk is a co-founder of Seabridge and has over 35 years of experience in the gold business, primarily as a senior executive in corporate development, bankable feasibility studies, and finance. Prior to Seabridge, he held senior positions with Greenstone Resources, Kirkwood Resources, and Amax Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Gary Sugar
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Sugar has over 40 years of experience in investment banking, specializing in the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: John Sabine
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Sabine is a lawyer with over 40 years of experience in mining law and corporate finance.

board_of_directors.name: Rudi Fronk
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Fronk is a co-founder of Seabridge and has over 35 years of experience in the gold business, primarily as a senior executive in corporate development, bankable feasibility studies, and finance. Prior to Seabridge, he held senior positions with Greenstone Resources, Kirkwood Resources, and Amax Gold.
